evals.prompt: Run /kraken:create-reporting-deploy-package from a repo root that has _deploy-request.json with environment=production, serverName=reports.domain.com, connectionString=Server=srv;Database=HReports;Trusted_Connection=True;. Repo has one .csproj: ReportingDashboard/ReportingDashboard.csproj with Sdk=Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web and TargetFramework=net8.0. dotnet build passes.
evals.expected_output: Announces using create-reporting-deploy-package skill. Finds ReportingDashboard.csproj as the web project. Detects net8.0 as target framework, ReportingDashboard as assembly name. Runs dotnet build — passes. Runs dotnet publish to temp dir. In parallel: writes appsettings.Production.json with the provided connection string, writes web.config with aspNetCore handler pointing to ReportingDashboard.dll using inprocess hosting. Writes DEPLOY-README.md with serverName reports.domain.com, iisSiteName CrispReporting, iisAppPool CrispReporting. Creates ZIP at G:\My Drive\!ai\BY SaaS\batch\production-<date>.zip. Reports ZIP path.

evals.prompt: Run /kraken:create-reporting-deploy-package from a repo root that has NO _deploy-request.json.
evals.expected_output: Announces using create-reporting-deploy-package skill. Detects _deploy-request.json is missing. Prompts: 'What is the target environment name?' Waits for answer. Prompts: 'What is the target server hostname?' Waits for answer. Prompts: 'What is the SQL Server connection string?' Waits for answer. Writes _deploy-request.json to cwd with provided values plus iisSiteName=CrispReporting and iisAppPool=CrispReporting as defaults. Then proceeds with the workflow as normal.

evals.prompt: Run /kraken:create-reporting-deploy-package. Valid _deploy-request.json exists. Repo has two web .csproj files: App/App.csproj and App.Admin/App.Admin.csproj, both with Sdk=Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web.
evals.expected_output: Announces using create-reporting-deploy-package skill. Validate phase finds two web projects. Stops and reports: 'Multiple web projects found: App/App.csproj, App.Admin/App.Admin.csproj. Add a "projectPath" field to _deploy-request.json to specify which one to publish.' Does NOT proceed with dotnet publish. Does NOT create a ZIP.

evals.prompt: Run /kraken:create-reporting-deploy-package. Valid _deploy-request.json exists. Single web .csproj found. dotnet build fails with CS0246 compile error.
evals.expected_output: Announces using create-reporting-deploy-package skill. Validate phase finds the web project. Runs dotnet build — fails with CS0246. Stops and outputs the build error. Does NOT run dotnet publish. Does NOT create a ZIP. Reports the error so the developer can fix the compile issue.
